name: @topgrid/grid-pro-pivot-core
description: Framework-neutral pivot engine: declarative 2-D pivot transform + pure value reducers (no React/Vue). Consumed by @topgrid/grid-pro-pivot (React) and grid-pro-pivot-vue.

scripts.test: node --experimental-strip-types src/sortPivotRows.test.ts && node --experimental-strip-types src/collapsePivotRows.test.ts && node --experimental-strip-types src/transposePivotConfig.test.ts && node --experimental-strip-types src/customizePivotTotals.test.ts && node --experimental-strip-types src/filterPivotRows.test.ts && node --experimental-strip-types src/movePivotField.test.ts && node computePivot.test.mjs
